title: Emergency AI regulation — G7 moratorium on frontier AI
historical_analogue: EU AI Act emergency provisions, Biden AI Executive Order 2023, OpenAI governance crisis
description: Following a high-profile AI safety incident, G7 governments impose an emergency 6-month moratorium on training AI models above 10^25 FLOPs. NVIDIA's order book collapses. Cloud providers cancel data center expansions. AI-dependent startups cannot raise. Big Tech valuations crater.
